rationale: The cited paper appears potentially substantive because it provides long-run evidence on discounting, base sales, and regular price elasticity in CPG scanner data, which closely overlaps the citing paper’s focus on brand performance under prolonged price cuts and post-war price restoration. The citing note also emphasizes marketing-mix moderators, dynamic brand outcomes over 309 weeks, and endogeneity control—areas where the cited paper is a plausible prior mechanism/foundational benchmark rather than an incidental mention.
